judgeReasoning: The response covers all three required points: it explains group organizes navigation, llms.txt sections, and AGENTS.md grouping; it characterizes /llms-full.txt as the monolithic all-docs file that is not split by group; and it names multiple valid optional frontmatter fields (lastModified, deprecated, icon, experimental, canary, new, draft, tags, full, lastAuthor).
